mapper.insert: INSERT INTO memory ( pet_id, chapter_type, display_order, title, content, image_url, is_representative, recorded_at ) VALUES ( #{petId}, #{chapterType}, #{displayOrder}, #{title}, #{content}, #{imageUrl}, #{isRepresentative}, #{recordedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT memory_id, pet_id, chapter_type, display_order, title, content, image_url, is_representative, recorded_at, created_at FROM memory WHERE memory_id = #{memoryId}
SELECT memory_id, pet_id, chapter_type, display_order, title, content, image_url, is_representative, recorded_at, created_at FROM memory ORDER BY memory_id DESC

SELECT memory_id, pet_id, chapter_type, display_order, title, content, image_url, is_representative, recorded_at, created_at FROM memory WHERE pet_id = #{petId} ORDER BY CASE chapter_type WHEN 'INTRO' THEN 1 WHEN 'DAILY' THEN 2 WHEN 'ILLNESS' THEN 3 WHEN 'FAREWELL' THEN 4 WHEN 'AFTER' THEN 5 ELSE 99 END, display_order ASC, memory_id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE memory SET chapter_type = #{chapterType}, display_order = #{displayOrder}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, is_representative = #{isRepresentative}, recorded_at = #{recordedAt} WHERE memory_id = #{memoryId}
